title: Kenyan Melted Pea Stew
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew made with Kenyan spices, peas, and melted cheese, perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: Use a combination of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

ingredients.name: tagine
ingredients.notes: Use the oil from the tagine for added flavor

instructions: Heat the tagine oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the Kenyan spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the peas and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Stir in the melted cheese until melted and heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
